description: Follow-up after delivering a TTLG diagnostic or Mirror Report.
subject: Your {{diagnostic_name}} — next moves

body_sections.content: The diagnostic surfaced {{gap_count}} gaps. The top 3 by impact: {{top_gaps}}.

local_champion.avatar_next_step: The fastest win is lead response automation. Most {{niche}} shops that install it see 30-50% more booked jobs in 60 days.
local_champion.avatar_cta: Want me to set it up for you? I can have it running this week.

solo_strategic_consultant.avatar_next_step: The highest leverage move is the Productization Engine — turn your top engagement into a repeatable offer. It's the gap that most constrains your scale.
solo_strategic_consultant.avatar_cta: Should we book 45 minutes to scope the Productization install?

boutique_agency_founder.avatar_next_step: The margin recovery starts with the Delivery Playbook system — standardizing the top 3 service lines first, then expanding.
boutique_agency_founder.avatar_cta: I can send a 4-week install proposal by EOD tomorrow. Want me to?

fractional_executive.avatar_next_step: Per-client context vaults are the unlock. Start with your 2 biggest engagements.

technical_founder_operator.avatar_next_step: The reference architecture + sovereign install is the fastest path. Repo + docs + 90-min pairing session.
technical_founder_operator.avatar_cta: Want the repo link and a scheduling link?

solo_operator.avatar_next_step: Start with the Template Pack + 30-min guided setup. First value in 24 hours.
solo_operator.avatar_cta: Ready to start? I'll send the payment link.

agency_builder.avatar_next_step: The Scaling Playbook — 6-week installation across your delivery, sales, and reporting layers.
agency_builder.avatar_cta: I'll send the full proposal tomorrow. Anyone else on your team should be on the walkthrough call?

creative_hustler.avatar_next_step: The Creator Stack — resonance reports, audience segmentation, monetization layer. Self-serve onboarding.
creative_hustler.avatar_cta: Drop your email and I'll send the creator stack setup guide.
